title: Horizontal Pod Autoscaling — What's next
text:
If you configure autoscaling in your cluster, you may also want to consider using
node autoscaling
to ensure you are running the right number of nodes.
You can also read more about
vertical
Pod autoscaling
.
For more information on HorizontalPodAutoscaler:
Read a
walkthrough example
for horizontal pod autoscaling.
Read documentation for
kubectl autoscale
.
If you would like to write your own custom metrics adapter, check out the
boilerplate
to get started.
Read the
API reference
for HorizontalPodAutoscaler.
